expected_tasks: Study product basics and ask questions.
observed_evidence: Many reference PDFs and D&D materials appeared.
risk: If not staged, learning becomes unbounded.
boundary_needed: Product basics only; no customer deliverable ownership.
monitoring_question: What concepts are required this week? What can wait?

expected_tasks: Attend customer meetings and understand context.
risk: Live customer context may become hidden responsibility.
boundary_needed: Observe and summarize; no decision authority.
monitoring_question: Is the employee expected to act or only observe?

risk: Note-taking can become consulting analysis without support.
boundary_needed: Record facts; questions reviewed by senior.
monitoring_question: Who reviews meeting notes and clarifies misunderstandings?

expected_tasks: Translate or summarize English technical/business materials.
observed_evidence: Carsome subtitles, payment help, English training materials.
risk: Language work consumes learning time and changes role identity.
boundary_needed: Translation tasks should be separated from ERP learning milestones.
monitoring_question: Is translation treated as learning support or deliverable?

expected_tasks: Prepare alignment/O2C decks or demo materials.
observed_evidence: O2C and alignment decks appeared in February.
risk: Early presenter role requires conceptual mastery.
boundary_needed: Presentation only after guided rehearsal and feedback.
monitoring_question: Was feedback given before presentation output was expected?

risk: Data reconciliation is operational responsibility, not beginner learning.
boundary_needed: Use sandbox/synthetic data first; clear source-of-truth map.
monitoring_question: What authority does the employee have to judge mismatch?

expected_tasks: Create workflow manual or upload procedure.
observed_evidence: US Sales Order Uploading Manual appeared.
risk: Manual writing externalizes company knowledge through a new employee.
boundary_needed: Provide template, reviewer, and final ownership.
monitoring_question: Who approves the manual as official?

expected_tasks: Learn Item, BOM, Routing, Work Order, MRP, costing.
risk: Manufacturing ERP has high prerequisite load.
boundary_needed: Stage concepts by module; practice in sandbox.
monitoring_question: Which manufacturing concepts are beginner vs advanced?

expected_tasks: Build private glossary and study sheets.
risk: Organization shifts curriculum design to employee.
boundary_needed: Use self-study as supplement, not primary structure.
monitoring_question: Which parts of self-study are validated by mentor?

expected_tasks: Support live project outputs and analysis.
observed_evidence: Live customer artifacts and implementation templates appeared.
risk: Role escalation can occur without explicit promotion or training.
monitoring_question: What deliverables is the employee accountable for?
